diagnosis.final_diagnosis: Acute on Chronic Heart Failure with Preserved Ejection Fraction, Severe Tricuspid Valve Regurgitation, Pleural effusion, Pericardial Effusion
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The clinical presentation of progressive shortness of breath and imaging findings of massive cardiomegaly with moderate to large pericardial effusion, along with echocardiographic signs of tricuspid regurgitation and volume overload, led to the diagnosis of acute on chronic heart failure exacerbation.
